response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, testing culture, and some high-throughput systems exposure, but falls well short of the core requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly a year (National Instruments plus thesis work) versus the required 8 years, and their background centers on web/full-stack development in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure leadership. There is no demonstrated formal technical-leadership role owning platform strategy or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Strong testing and engineering-practice culture (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, ran workshops)
Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: C++ experience (~1 year) is far below the 8-year minimum requirement
Career is predominantly web/full-stack product work, not cloud compute or large-scale infrastructure
No formal technical-lead experience managing priorities, deadlines, and cross-team alignment

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering practices and mentoring aptitude
